personality_one_liner: A sharp, performance-oriented command center with athletic warmth, built for live tracking and focused video training.

spacing.rule: Dense but scannable. Use smaller gaps inside metrics or sets, and larger padding around main cards and sections. Zero accidental whitespace.

do's: Use solid surfaceSecondary and tonal dividers instead of blur for clarity on dense data screens
dont's: No glass on bottom tabs or nav headers - keep it sharp and tactical per personality

screens.name: Treino do Dia (Home)
screens.purpose: A focused dashboard showing today's personalized plan and quick start action.

states.empty: Illustration of court + 'Nenhum treino hoje, descanse!' + CTA to library

screens.layout: Header with user greeting. Hero card at top for 'Treino Atual' with full-bleed background image and gradient scrim, orange primary CTA sticky at bottom. Below hero: list of today's exercises (compact rows with small video thumbnails).

screens.name: Biblioteca
screens.purpose: Video library catalog for all volleyball techniques and conditioning exercises.
screens.layout: Sticky horizontal chip row at the top for filters (Saque, Manchete, Toque, Ataque, Bloqueio, Condicionamento). Below: 2-column card grid of exercises. Each card has a video thumbnail, play icon overlay, title, and duration.

screens.name: Progresso
screens.purpose: Tracks completed workouts and technique improvement over time.

states.empty: Comece a treinar para ver suas estatísticas aqui

screens.layout: Top section: High-impact condensed typography showing key metrics (Treinos Concluídos, Horas). Below: A simple bar chart or list of recent activity (Workout history).

screens.name: Admin Web Panel (Exercises & Students)
screens.purpose: Web interface to manage the video library and assign plans to students.
screens.layout: Sidebar navigation (web). Data tables for students and exercises with search and filter. Modal or dedicated form page for uploading video links (YouTube/Vimeo) and assigning plans. Retains the dark theme but uses wider, dashboard-style data grids.

hero_home_workout.alt: Men playing volleyball at the net, spiking action

category_saque.alt: Woman reaching up to hit a volleyball

category_condicionamento.alt: Woman holding black rope for conditioning

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility personality: use #121212 for the background, NO BLUE/PURPLE hues. Warm athletic orange (#FF6B00) is the sole accent.
Web admin panel routes MUST use the same design system and Expo Router, adapting to wider viewports (sidebar nav + data tables instead of bottom tabs).
Use Barlow Condensed for large metrics, section titles, and score-like stats. Use Satoshi for standard labels, body text, and table data.
Implement a horizontal ScrollView with chips (`surfaceSecondary` or `brandTertiary` background when selected) for the Exercise Library categories.
Every video card must have an image thumbnail using expo-image, an overlaid play icon, and a vertical gradient scrim to ensure text contrast at the bottom.
Ensure 'Marcar como concluído' (Mark as completed) buttons use the `brandPrimary` color and are full-width or sticky at the bottom for workout plans.
Use Phosphor icons consistently, weight: bold or regular, matching the sharp athletic vibe.
